3083160.name: Defend 99
3083160.description:
Survive Ninety Nine waves. Build a board of towers from different manufacturers with varied abilities, equip them with Mods and Buddies and plan ahead to deal with enemy-buffing weather forecasts.

As a trainee for the AEGIS corporation - you'll need to balance your strategic and economic skills in order to defend your core against the digital attackers in this roguelite tower-defense game.

  • Collect bits to build towers, adapt to your randomized shop in search of those important upgrades and strengthen your towers with Mods and Buddies to create powerful combinations.

  • Keep an eye on the invaders, they will throw a variety of unit types with different strengths, weaknesses and abilities to bypass your defenses.

  • Watch out for weather! Different weather types will buff enemies in different ways - watch the forecasts and plan ahead.

  • Blackouts. Reserve power will have your towers functioning, but visibility may be impaired until main power is restored.

Customize your deck as you progress, with upgrades you find along the way. Be wary of hazardous software.

-- Please note that the AEGIS corporation has a zero tolerance policy on failure. Anything but success will result in your termination and immediate replacement. Our clients deserve the best. --
